question: What are the different subsets of documents related to each document id , list the name of the document subset and id of the actual document ?
sql: SELECT Document_Subset_Members.Document_Object_ID, Document_Subset_Members.Document_Subset_ID, Document_Subsets.Document_Subset_Name FROM Document_Subset_Members JOIN Document_Subsets ON Document_Subset_Members.Document_Subset_ID = Document_Subsets.Document_Subset_ID GROUP BY Document_Subset_Members.Document_Object_ID, Document_Subset_Members.Document_Subset_ID;

back_translation.intent: 获取文档子集成员与其对应的文档子集名称的关联信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求列出每个文档id相关的不同子集及其名称和实际文档id，但SQL描述中未体现文档id的关联关系，且缺少必要的分组逻辑。目标表应包含Document_Subset_Members与Document_Subsets的连接，但group_by字段为空导致无法按文档id分组。
